changes.exact_quote: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
changes.proposed_redline: Delete any fixed-term employment guarantee and state that employment is at will and may end at any time by either party.

changes.exact_quote: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. At each annual review, Company will credit Executive with 25% additional vesting of then-unvested equity notwithstanding any plan or award terms.
changes.proposed_redline: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment.

changes.exact_quote: Executive excludes an improvement made during employment because a related background invention appears on the schedule, including the employment-created improvement itself. Executive discloses potentially assigned inventions within 5 days and may propose clerical schedule updates within 20 days.
changes.proposed_redline: Executive will protect Company confidential information, assign all inventions and work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources, and list excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.
changes.proposed_redline: All incentive compensation and equity are subject to applicable clawback, recoupment, and forfeiture requirements under law, listing rules, and Company policy.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
